underlying_goal: Create a feature-flagged rebranded login page matching Figma designs, using hex-2 theme tokens, with banner, updated styling, and ship it as a PR
friction_detail: Multiple rounds of visual refinement needed because Claude kept getting spacing/sizing wrong, and once overcorrected making the form too small, requiring the user to re-share the Figma design.
brief_summary: User wanted a feature-flagged rebranded login page matching Figma designs; after several visual iteration rounds and CI fixes, the PR was shipped green.
